hero.subtitle: AMANCE is committed to alleviating the suffering of the most vulnerable and preserving Cameroon's unique biodiversity. Together, let's build a sustainable and dignified future for all.

domains.title: Our Commitment on the Ground
domains.subtitle: Four complementary pillars of action for a global, sustainable and measurable impact on Cameroonian communities.

humanitarian.title: Humanitarian & Social Aid
humanitarian.desc: We provide direct assistance to people in precarious situations: food, shelter, psychosocial support and emergency material aid.

health.title: Health & Well-being
health.desc: Facilitating access to basic health care, hygiene education and well-being for rural communities and vulnerable populations.

community.title: Community Development
community.desc: Strengthening the autonomy of local communities through sustainable development projects, education, vocational training and entrepreneurship.

environment.title: Environmental Conservation
environment.desc: Protecting Cameroon's exceptional fauna and flora through environmental education programs and active biodiversity conservation.

impact.title: A Concrete, Measurable and Sustainable Impact
impact.subtitle: Every action counts. Every donation transforms lives. Here is what we have accomplished together.

featured_project.title: Tomorrow's Forest
featured_project.desc1: In the heart of Cameroon's forests, our flagship conservation and reforestation project combines biodiversity protection and local economic development. We train rural communities in sustainable agroforestry, creating a replicable model nationwide.
featured_project.desc2: This project has already reforested more than 50 hectares of degraded forest, trained 80 farmers and improved the incomes of 200 rural families. It aligns directly with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDG 13, 15).
featured_project.floating_badge: of reforested forest in the East region

help.title: Join Us. Every Gesture Counts.
help.subtitle: Whether you are an individual, a company or an institution, there is a way to contribute to our mission and amplify our impact.

donation.title: Make a Donation
donation.desc: Your financial support is vital. It allows us to plan our actions, respond to emergencies and guarantee the sustainability of our projects on the ground.

partner.title: Become a Partner
partner.desc: Institutions, companies, NGOs: let's join forces for a multiplied impact. Contact us to explore synergies and collaboration opportunities.

volunteer.title: Become a Volunteer
volunteer.desc: Offer your time and skills. Join a passionate team and live an unforgettable human and professional experience on the ground in Cameroon.

item1.title: Emergency food distribution in the North-West region
item1.excerpt: The AMANCE team organized a food aid distribution for more than 200 displaced families in the North-West region of Cameroon.

item2.title: Launch of the reforestation program in Buea
item2.excerpt: In partnership with local authorities, AMANCE is launching an ambitious reforestation program aiming to restore 50 hectares of degraded forest.

item3.title: Agroforestry training for 80 farmers
item3.excerpt: AMANCE has trained 80 farmers from rural communities in sustainable agroforestry techniques, combining food production and environmental protection.

testimonials.quote: "Thanks to AMANCE, I was able to follow a training in sustainable agriculture. Today, I feed my family and sell my harvests at the local market. They haven't just changed my life — they have given hope back to our entire village."
testimonials.name: Marie Ngono
testimonials.role: Beneficiary — Community development program, Center Region

final_cta.title: Together, we can make a difference.
final_cta.subtitle: Join AMANCE and contribute to building a fairer, healthier and greener Cameroon. Every contribution, big or small, has a real impact on real lives.
